ATL.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Young core, draft capital. Kuminga/Risacher trade chips. Seeking PG/C upgrades.

BOS.note: Tatum returns healthy. Second apron team, limited flexibility. Restricted to minor moves.

BKN.note: Significant cap space and draft picks. Young core, potential major free agency/trade player.

CHA.note: Young core on rookie deals, cap flexibility. Seeking upgrades, potential buyer at deadline.

CHI.note: Limited cap flexibility, likely over 1st apron. Older core, potential seller at deadline.

CLE.note: Second apron team. Core locked in, minor flexibility. Stand-pat or minor buyer.

DET.note: Young core, significant cap space. Aggressive buyer in free agency/trades.

IND.note: Haliburton returns healthy. Young core, cap flexibility. Potential buyer for upgrades.

MIA.note: Second apron team. Limited flexibility, veteran core. Minor moves or stand-pat.

MIL.note: Second apron team. Veteran core, limited flexibility. Hard-capped, stand-pat.

NYK.note: Second apron team. Core locked in, limited flexibility. Buyer for specific needs.

ORL.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Young core, some trade assets. Buyer for complementary pieces.

PHI.note: Significant cap space. Embiid-led, aggressive buyer for star talent.

TOR.note: Young core, some cap flexibility. Seeking talent, potential buyer at deadline.

WAS.note: #1 pick Dybantsa. Deep cap space, young core. Aggressive rebuild, buyer for future assets.

DAL.note: Davis/Doncic era. Second apron team, limited flexibility. Buyer for veteran depth.

DEN.note: Second apron team. Championship core, limited flexibility. Stand-pat or minor moves.

GSW.note: Second apron team. Aging core, limited flexibility. Potential seller or minor moves.

HOU.note: Young core, some cap flexibility. Seeking veteran talent, potential buyer.

LAC.note: Second apron team. Veteran core, limited flexibility. Hard-capped, stand-pat.

LAL.note: Doncic era. Hard-capped at 1st apron. Seeking complementary talent, buyer at deadline.

MEM.note: Young core, cap flexibility. Morant returns healthy. Buyer for upgrades.

MIN.note: Second apron team. Core locked in, limited flexibility. Stand-pat or minor buyer.

NOP.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Zion trade chip. Seeking roster retooling.

OKC.note: Young core on rookie deals, cap flexibility. Buyer for star talent or key role players.

PHX.note: Second apron team. Veteran core, limited flexibility. Hard-capped, stand-pat.

POR.note: Young core, cap space. Seeking talent, potential buyer in free agency/trades.

SAC.note: Hard-capped at 1st apron. Core locked in, limited flexibility. Buyer for depth.

SAS.note: Deep young core on cheap deals, significant cap flexibility. Aggressive buyer/trader.

UTA.note: Young core, cap flexibility. Seeking talent, potential buyer at deadline.
